pullRequest.title: DOM-55050 Fix provenance checkpoint authz part 2 (FE)

nodes.body:
looks like we dont have any separate tests involving `getProvenanceCheckpointsForExecution` (the new one)? is it easy enough for you to add one that would be useful, or would that need frontend expertise?

or are there already other tests that just dont even need to be updated because the name is staying the same?
I'll take a look once I can get a working deploy up
